calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lavon Granger. Daniel Bornstein, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Santa Fe Associates, Inc. and Defendant, Yvette Augmon, appeared in pro per. Also present was Tobias River, Representative of the Plaintiff. The matter settled per written stipulation of the parties which is read into the record.

DEMURRER
